strings.name: Maptime Tirana
strings.description: Social events organized around mapping - beginners most welcome!
strings.extendedDescription: Maptime is an open learning environment for all levels and degrees of knowledge, offering intentional educational support for the beginner. Maptime is simultaneously flexible and structured, creating space for mapping tutorials, workshops, ongoing projects with a shared goal, and independent/collaborative work time.
